name: promote --apply moves the rule from the working overlay to official (a move, not a copy)
command: ID=P557P02; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/acquire-technology-rules.sh" --technology Vue --project $ID --source-file g.txt --source-id sg557p02 --now 2026-07-05T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-project-rule.sh" --project $ID --namespace vue --apply 2>/dev/null >/dev/null; ok=no; [ -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/vue/sg557p02.yaml ] && [ ! -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID/vue/sg557p02.yaml ] && ok=yes; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/vue; rm -rf "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"/_project/$ID; [ "$ok" = yes ] && echo promote-apply-moves 1>&2
setup: printf '%s\n' 'Always bind a unique key to every loop element.' 'Never combine conditional and loop on one element.' > g.txt
